files.notes: This file contains multiple distinct sections: a main article about farm women, field notes from various stakes, comprehensive guide lessons for April covering multiple subjects (theology, work/business, literature, social service), a book review section, and a short piece on prosperity. The guide lessons section is particularly long and contains multiple sub-lessons with different topics.
